import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      let v = if neg
        -cur
      else
        cur
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end

end

  if first

    first = false

end
